hooks.command: if [ "${CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE}" = "true" ]; then echo 'Environment: claude.ai web (weekly /knowledge-curator runs automatically)'; else echo 'Environment: CLI/IDE (run /knowledge-curator manually or use /loop weekly /knowledge-curator)'; fi; if [ ! -f CLAUDE.md ] || [ $(wc -c < CLAUDE.md) -lt 50 ]; then echo 'ONBOARDING NOT COMPLETE: Run /onboarding before starting work.'; else echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'n/a')"; echo "Status: $(git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo 'clean')"; echo "Last commit: $(git log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null || echo 'none')"; fi; if [ -f .claude/knowledge.md ]; then echo ''; echo '--- Knowledge base ---'; grep -A3 '## Summary' .claude/knowledge.md | tail -n +2 | head -3; echo "(last updated: $(grep '_Last updated:' .claude/knowledge.md | head -1 | sed 's/.*: //;s/_//'))"; fi; if [ -n "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE" ]; then echo "export CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE=${CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE}" >> "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE"; fi
